item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I appreciate it kindly! I think I'll try to change the emote to something different so that it's more visible to everyone.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I've been replaying Halo so calling an evil alien race of conquerors the "Covenant" is a little goofy to me. I'm also not familiar with the game show, and so had trouble visualizing the structure of what was going on (though the important bit that he was clearly trying to send a message with the word selectin still made sense). Finally, the "moon emoji" just shows up as a box to me on desktop.

All that said, the core idea here is a good one and the execution is solid. Easy +1, nice work.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this only thing I can say is that "Conversations of outer space outside of testing are not to be discussed around SCP-4794-1." sounds a little awkward other than that very nice piece.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hey all, so this is my first ever SCP on the site. I have no idea how to code this so… thank you to RockTeethMothEyes and NamelessMediocre for offering crit and overall polish. (There's some others here I forgot, but I still thank you regardless!)

Inspired from this.

I got the images from Here and Here. Just slightly edited the first one with my own stuff.

So.. I'm honestly not sure if the ending is that strong, I was looking for ways to make it stronger but I heard a crosslink was a fairly good inclusion, so I went with it.
